title: Global Government Contracts & Tenders Scraper Input
description: Search official public procurement sources and export normalized tender records for tender digests, opportunity monitoring, and AI bid/no-bid triage.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Official procurement sources to search. Use UK Contracts Finder and EU TED for no-key public tender discovery. Select SAM.gov only when you provide a SAM.gov API key.

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: Search terms for opportunity matching, such as software, roofing, security, construction, facilities, or cybersecurity. Leave empty to return recent tenders from selected sources.

dateFrom.title: Published from
dateFrom.description: Publication start date in YYYY-MM-DD. Defaults to 30 days ago. A single run can cover at most 366 days.

dateTo.title: Published to
dateTo.description: Publication end date in YYYY-MM-DD. Defaults to today and must be on or after Published from.

country.title: Country filter
country.description: Optional country, region, or state filter. For SAM.gov use a US state code like CA or NY. For UK/TED, this matches the normalized buyer country or region.

noticeStatus.title: Notice status
noticeStatus.description: Which opportunity status to target where supported. Use Active / open for actionable alerts and All available for research/backfills.

decisionProfile.title: Bid / opportunity profile
decisionProfile.description: Optional deterministic bid/no-bid triage preferences. These settings score saved opportunities but do not change official source data or invent missing facts.

preferredKeywords.title: Preferred keywords
preferredKeywords.description: Terms that increase fit, such as cloud, cybersecurity, software, or managed services. Falls back to the main Keywords field when empty.

preferredRegions.title: Preferred regions
preferredRegions.description: Countries, regions, or cities that increase fit, such as United Kingdom, London, Germany, or California.

preferredCategories.title: Preferred categories / codes
preferredCategories.description: Category words or CPV/NAICS/PSC code fragments that increase fit, such as IT services or 72000000.

excludedKeywords.title: Excluded keywords
excludedKeywords.description: Terms that force a skip recommendation when found in the published opportunity text.

minimumContractValue.title: Minimum contract value
minimumContractValue.description: Optional minimum published value. Set Minimum value currency too; no exchange-rate conversion is performed.

minimumValueCurrency.title: Minimum value currency
minimumValueCurrency.description: Currency for the minimum value comparison, such as GBP, EUR, or USD. Records in another currency are flagged rather than compared.

minimumDaysToDeadline.title: Minimum days to deadline
minimumDaysToDeadline.description: Opportunities with fewer remaining days receive a warning and score penalty. Defaults to 7 days.

maxResults.title: Max results
maxResults.description: Maximum total records saved across all selected sources and keywords. For AI agents and quick validation, use a small limit such as 1-10.

samApiKey.title: SAM.gov API key
samApiKey.description: Optional SAM.gov public API key. Required only when SAM.gov is selected.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Compatibility setting for older saved tasks. Official API calls are direct; leave Apify Proxy disabled. Enabled proxy routing is rejected.
